description: (FAIL, _, RED) is forbidden: a FAIL Tier 1 forces fail-fast (§ 5 R3), so the behavioral tier never runs and t3 cannot be RED. Although the final verdict would 'happen' to be FAIL, the triple itself is one a conformant implementation MUST NOT produce — it asserts a behavioral run that the fail-fast boundary forbids.
why: § 6 R9 names (FAIL, _, RED) as unreachable; § 5 R3 fail-fast forces t3=SKIPPED after a Tier 1 floor miss.
